name: Noest Express
notes: Popular COD carrier; publishes its bureaux on its public site, each with a Google Maps link resolved to coordinates. Merchant tracking API is private.

name: Yalidine Express
notes: Largest COD network; publishes an open geocoded stop-desk table that also lists partner operators (federated relay). Documented developer API (centers/communes/wilayas) is merchant-key gated.

name: Anderson Logistics
notes: Publishes an agency directory; each agency carries its own Google Maps link, resolved to coordinates.

name: Guepex
notes: Publishes an open geocoded agencies JSON; shares the same stop-desk network/center ids as Yalidine (federated relay).

name: Maystro Delivery
notes: Social-commerce focused; its public coverage page lists each stop-desk with a Google Maps link, resolved to coordinates. Merchant integration API is private.

name: EasyAndSpeed
notes: Stop-desk operator present in the Yalidine/Guepex relay network.

name: Zimou Express
notes: Stop-desk operator present in the Guepex relay data.

name: WeCanServices
notes: Stop-desk operator present in the relay network.

name: SpeedMail
notes: Appears in the relay network; own site is a WooCommerce shop with no public agency directory.

name: Aramex Algeria
notes: International; a handful of offices, locator behind a WAF.

name: Conexlog (UPS Algeria)
notes: UPS-authorized contractor; a 'Nos bureaux' page lists desk addresses but without coordinates or an API.

name: DHD
notes: COD carrier listed by integration libraries; no open agency list found.

name: DHL Express Algeria
notes: International express; service points available via DHL's licensed Location Finder API (not redistributable).

name: Ecotrack
notes: Delivery aggregator that integrates several carriers; no single open agency export.

name: Kazi Tour
notes: Primarily home delivery / trucking; site has no populated agency directory.

name: ZR Express
notes: Operations via the Procolis portal (auth-gated); public site is Cloudflare-blocked. No open agency list.
